text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As summer camp comes to an end, I ask Super
Creek how she feels about her summer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I had a really pleasant time. My mind felt
completely free, unlike last year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Not having a single worry really is wonderful. It
means we can focus on other things.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We can squint our eyes beneath the harsh sun
above as we walk towards a brighter future,
slowly working together day by day...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, speaking of which... have you gotten a little
tan, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. Awww, it's like you're growing up right
before my very eyes. You're not a fledgling
trainer anymore...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I bet other Umamusume will be latching onto you
now too.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Just remember—wandering off with other
Umamusume just because they ask you to is a big
no-no!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We've got to keep our eyes on the fall G1 series,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Duly reminded, I resolve to buckle down and
work towards the autumn Tenno Sho.
